 |    ✓     |                     [fmt](https://fmt.dev)                     |   >= 10.0.0    | Required for formatted text output.                                                                                                                              |

-|    ✓     |     [fast_float](https://github.com/FastFloat/fast_float)      |    >= 3.2.0    | Required for parsing floating point numbers. (Bundled as submodule.)                                                                                             |
